name: Raccoons. The First Words
overview: We are developing speech easily and fun with the new musical series for the youngest - "Raccoons: The first words"! Colorful raccoons will introduce viewers to simple words, teach them how to distinguish and use them correctly in different situations. Their new friends, the robot Notik and his assistant Dee, will explore the world and their native language with the raccoons. Even Baby Xi, the smallest inhabitant of the music box, will speak. More songs, dances and games in the new season!
